title: More training examples help; more unique problems do not yet
decision: Treat total example exposure, not unique clean-problem count, as the active scale factor; audit local action components before extending the curve.
plain_summary: At matched exposure, 2k versus 6k and 6k versus 18k unique problems are tied. Tripling total presentations nearly halves token and recursive error. Width and LDAD comparisons need optimizer-step matching.
